description: Address second PR review round on custom login page: flash prevention via beforeEnter guard and async watch, try/catch in handleLogin, aria-busy/aria-live on button, semantic <main> wrapper.
steps: Add beforeEnter guard to /login route in router/index.ts redirecting authenticated users to stages
Add watch on isAuthenticated in LoginPage.vue for async redirect after store initializes
Add :aria-busy and aria-live attrs to .btn-google button
acceptance_criteria: Router /login route has beforeEnter guard that checks authStore.isAuthenticated and redirects to stages
LoginPage.vue watches isAuthenticated and calls router.replace to stages when it becomes true
